2.  Easter Banners

# Easter Banners

### Custom Easter Banners 

 

![Custom Easter Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/f2053c5c08f840feacd65a9a4b305a89.jpg)

*   [Finishing Options](#0968c789-18fb-4d4b-91cc-2d5e36947734)
*   [Order Process](#ba3da710-edff-4261-a757-922c1d6f5ca6)
*   [Production Times](#a32656e3-94e4-4f12-b4e0-4df466adbb58)
*   [Shipping](#e90a1c7b-3de0-4f14-8c61-332f8506cbb7)

### Easter Banner Finishing Options

The standard finishing option for Easter banners is heat welded hems and grommets every 2-4 feet around the banner perimeter. You will not need to add any bleeds on your artwork. We will add the extra material when we print your banner.

#### Additional Finishing Options

*   2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
*   3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
*   4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter
*   Reinforced Corners
*   Reinforced Hems

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3" or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets.

\*\*Pole Pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height.

**Hems & Grommets**

**Reinforced Hems**

**Reinforced Corners**

**Pole Pockets**

![Vinyl Banners Hems and Grommet Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/291886d1-dd6d-4fdf-9f62-c5b6826dba17.jpg)

![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Hem Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced-Hems-for-Vinyl-Banners.jpg)

![Vinyl Banner Reinforced Corner Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Reinforced Corners for Vinyl Banners.jpg)

![Vinyl Banner Pole Pocket Finishing | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/728828a0-b142-4abc-98ec-5b404600dca9.jpg)

#### Two Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish two sided banners up to 150 square feet. For anything larger, please contact us. Double sided banners can only have pole pockets or hems and grommet finishing.

[Visit our banner finishing options page](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banner-finishing-options) for more information about the vinyl banner finishing options we offer.

_We do not recommend wind slits in banners, therefore we do not offer them. For more information as to why, [visit our page on wind slits](https://www.banners.com/wind-slits)._

### Three Ways to Order Easter Banners

There are three ways you can order Easter banners online.

1.  Pick an Easter Banner Template to Customize
    *   Add a background, clip art images, text or upload your own graphics
2.  Upload a File
    *   For our complete artwork specifications, [visit our artwork specifications page](https://www.banners.com/artwork-specs)
3.  Let Us Design
    *   We have a team of graphic designers who can design a custom vinyl banner for you. Upload any artwork you want on your banner and provide instructions for us

#### Payment Information

All Easter banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards. We also accept checks. Checks must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see our blog.](https://banners-com.blogspot.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html) If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative for your options.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order.

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### **1 Business Day Priority:**

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

![1 Business Day Priority Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-1 Business Day Priority.jpg)

*   **Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

### Shipping Information

This Product will be produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

All standard banners are rolled, bagged, and placed into a shipping box which are then shipped. Please specify which shipping method you would like when you place your order. We offer a 1-3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States. [Visit our shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our standard and oversized vinyl banner shipping times. If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service prior to ordering. Phone: 320-965-9300

We offer the following shipping methods:

*   Economy (5-10 Business Days)
*   Standard (3-5 Business Days)
*   Three Day (3 Business Days)
*   Two Day (2 Business Days)
*   Overnight (1 Business Days)
*   Freight

Shipping prices are determined by the weight of the package and the destination. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders and over-sized packages. Please note, due to UPS shipping restrictions, banners that exceed 8' in both directions will generally be folded for shipping (billboards, large backdrops etc.)

If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

After products have shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if any shipping company has a delay in your package. We recommend ordering your banners early.

Delays because of Acts of God or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7-10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Please order your banners early as we cannot control delivery after your product leaves our production facilities.

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Easter is a time for celebration! Christ is Risen! Make the most of your Easter celebrations by ordering a full color banner for everyone to see! You can let everyone know what time the Easter Church services are, where and what time the Easter Egg hunts are, and much more! All vinyl banners are digitally printed in full color and include hems and grommets so you can easily hang your banner indoor or outdoors.

You can customize your banner with one of our free templates, have our team of designers create it for you, or upload your own artwork. You can also choose from several finishing options for a vinyl banner or vinyl sign that meets all your needs, including reinforced hems or pole pockets.

Our state-of-the-art production facility can accommodate orders of 1–1000+ banners and vinyl signs. We're the trusted experts in banner printing and we can help you make a statement at your next event. Get started below to put your message on display with a high-quality custom banner that you can't wait to hang.

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

### Material

Easter Banners are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength.

#### Easter Banner Printing

Easter banners are digitally printed in full color. You can select one of our banner templates to customize in the online designer with our backgrounds, clip art, and text. You can also upload your own images.

#### Easter Banner Sizes

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5ft banner could finish with a 2.5 inch variance.) If your banner size needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

_The maximum print for double-sided banner is 150 square feet. If your banner is over 150 square feet, please contact us._

### Artwork

#### Artwork Guidelines

Files that print best are .eps files converted to outline. We can also print high-resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats. If you don't have access to or are unsure if you have a high-resolution file, our professional graphic designers will be happy to assist with this.

#### Order Proofs

If you are are looking to give your order one last look and make sure all the information and images are correct, requesting and order proof will allow you that benefit. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order including pricing, and your billing and shipping information. Please note if you receive a proof, you will need to email or call back your customer service representative with approval before your order will go into production.

#### Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we highly recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact our team of friendly Customer Service Representatives (who are all professional graphic designers) to assist you with any questions you might have about our [vinyl banner printing](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banners) process.

**Did we answer all of your questions? If not, please give us a call and one of our customer service representatives would be happy to help. [320.965.9300](tel:13209659300).**

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
